violations.text: An employee was observed touching ready to eat food (lettuce) with bare hands. Food employees must not touch exposed, ready-to-eat food with their bare hands and shall use suitable utensils such as deli tissue, spatulas, single use gloves, or dispensing equipment. Disposed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2025

Uncovered sheetpans of food on the rolling rack in the walk in cooler were observed stacked, with the top pans in the food below. Food must be protected by packaging, covered containers, or wrapping. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2025
Water observed in stacked food containers on clean storage rack. After cleaning and sanitizing, equipment and utensils must be air dried. New Violation. Correct By: 08/29/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200 ppm. PIC refilled sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took out of service to be washed and sanitized. PIC purchased ice in meantime. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

Rice, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. PIC discarded. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Per interview, rice was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. PIC discarded rice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/20/2025
Food prep sink was observed lacking an air gap. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025
The door to the basement toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, vegetable chopper, plates on clean storage rack, sheet pans in basement) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink at the bar was 100 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be ( ) ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025

Working containers of some ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025

The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by live small flies in food prep areas. Encon Pest Control Service every 2 weeks. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025

Large dry ingredient bins are stored in an area of the basement without a proper ceiling. Food must be stored in a clean dry location, where they are not subject to dust, splash, or other contamination, and at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025
Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchen area. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonia sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sinks. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: chip bins including handles portion cup storage containers stove top area beneath grill broiler including underside dry ingredient bins refrigerator shelves refrigeration unit door handles prep units spice rails in cooking area wire rack above small prep unit . New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025
The area around the dumpsters have an accumulation of leaf litter and debris.Dumpster area must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025
The floor in the bar area is in poor repair, with a low section where debris accumulates.The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025

Floors, walls, some doors, and the ceiling in the basement have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. A side area leading into the employee toilet room has an accumulation of grease and debris.The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement and bar area cupboards. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025

The fan covers, ceiling, and walls in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025

Ceiling light panels in the kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and dead insects. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/07/2025
